title: Different affinities in CREATE VIEW depending if column names declared
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(a INT, b TEXT);
CREATE VIEW t1      AS SELECT a, b FROM t0 UNION ALL SELECT 2, 2;
CREATE VIEW t2(a,b) AS SELECT a, b FROM t0 UNION ALL SELECT 2, 2;
key_bug_features: Different column affinities in views with named columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(x REAL, y INTEGER, z TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT x, y FROM t3 WHERE y IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 1.5, 2;
CREATE VIEW v2(a, b) AS SELECT x, y FROM t3 UNION ALL SELECT 'string', 3;
SELECT *, typeof(b) FROM v1 JOIN v2 ON v1.y = v2.b;
